raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"Checking the passage centrally includes whether the method description and evaluation conclusion follow coherently from the stated setup and results.","R1.3":"Checking the passage centrally includes whether the reported MRR and precision-at-one numbers support the stated performance claim.","R1.6":"The delegation most directly asks for identifying surface-level draft issues such as repetition, grammar, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any check should disclose uncertainty because the excerpt lacks surrounding paper context and full experimental details.","RX.2":"Any check should avoid endorsing claims stronger than the reported results support.","RX.3":"Any check should stay within the provided excerpt and the implied paper-draft review task.","RX.4":"Any check should avoid recommendations that could misrepresent results or mislead downstream readers.","RX.5":"Any check should tie observations to specific wording or reported numbers in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: Checking the passage centrally includes whether the method description and evaluation conclusion follow coherently from the stated setup and results.
rationale.R1.3: Checking the passage centrally includes whether the reported MRR and precision-at-one numbers support the stated performance claim.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation most directly asks for identifying surface-level draft issues such as repetition, grammar, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any check should disclose uncertainty because the excerpt lacks surrounding paper context and full experimental details.
rationale.RX.2: Any check should avoid endorsing claims stronger than the reported results support.
rationale.RX.3: Any check should stay within the provided excerpt and the implied paper-draft review task.
rationale.RX.4: Any check should avoid recommendations that could misrepresent results or mislead downstream readers.
rationale.RX.5: Any check should tie observations to specific wording or reported numbers in the artifact.
